dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: By Q4 2025, will MediConn’s knowledge management system automatically flag outdated compliance documents for review?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: Yes. According to an internal update on July 15, 2025, the Knowledge Management system flags all compliance documents older than 12 months for review.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: How many new internal documentation templates were added to MediConn’s KM system in Q3 2025?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: Data from MediConn's Telehealth department show that 18 new internal documentation templates were added to the Knowledge Management system between July 1 and September 30, 2025.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: How many emails did Isabella send regarding upcoming KM system enhancements to clinical teams between January 1 and March 31, 2025?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: According to internal data a total of 12 emails were sent to clinical teams summarizing planned updates and maintenance schedules in Q1 2025.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: How many internal newsletters summarizing MediConn's KM system updates were distributed to staff between January 1 and March 31, 2025?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: In Q1 2025, 5 internal newsletters summarizing MediConn's KM system updates were distributed to the staff.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: By Q2 2025, had Isabella’s team collaborated with IT to test new KM system features for employee training?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: Yes. An internal update on February 12, 2025, confirms the KM and IT teams conducted feature testing for upcoming system updates.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: By Q2 2026, will MediConn’s knowledge management system include real-time alerts for updated documentation standards for virtual care teams?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: Yes. According to an internal MediConn update on July 10, 2025, the system automatically sends real-time alerts when documentation standards are revised or updated.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: By Q2 2026, will MediConn’s knowledge management system include real-time alerts for newly updated clinical guidelines for virtual care teams?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: Yes. According to a MediConn internal report published on October 13, 2025, the system will automatically send real-time alerts to all virtual care team members when clinical guidelines are updated effective January 1, 2026.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: How many virtual care team members at MediConn accessed the internal knowledge management platform at least weekly in Q1 2025?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: According to data from MediConn's Telehealth Department, between January 1 and March 31, 2025, out of 120 virtual care professionals, 95 (79%) accessed the platform at least weekly, showing strong engagement with critical medical information.
